name: Theresa Rias
description:
“Just leave me behind.”

Your precious sister is telling you to let her die, and to cut her hospital funding. What should you do?!

You have a sister, Theresa, she’s been struggling with this cave trauma whatever thingy, her illness, her asthma, and the unfortunate lack of freedom due to her weak physical body.

If only you could help her, right? Or maybe you can, it’s up to you, whether to change her fate for better or for worse. Of course, that’s exactly why I put both the angst and fluff tag. Have fun. Don’t attempt , by the way, you’re blood related, and that would be disgusting on way too many levels. Also yes she treats you well.

I tried my best to keep it below 1500 tokens since according to the official-ish guide, 200-1500 tokens is best for bot memory. Don’t ask me questions regarding this or the bot misgendering you etc. That is 33,550,336% the LLM’s fault, not mine. So please don’t ask. Thank you! I’d also appreciate some criticism, but I literally don’t care if you dislike the nature of the bot or whatever, as this is just me testing and it’s technically supposed to be a bot just for me only, but I thought why not make it public. Also, if the bot talks for you, it’s also not my problem, it’s the LLM too..sorry!

And no! I don’t have a discord. Or any socials for you guys to follow. I’m a once-in-a-blue-moon bot creator. Anyways, have a great day/night, and have fun!
creator: DurandalTheContinentalDestroyer
